## Meeting Purpose

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's calendar for next week is set, with focus on client meetings (Prongfu, Galileo, Tribe) and prospecting calls](https://fathom.video/share/B_dZrt5aYBEWMfFBuKqX-sJdp_Fsk3o5?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
